utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: This is the hardest letter I have ever had to write .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: What the hell a matter with you ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_you blew off his sister with a letter

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: How do you think Joey going to react when he finds out that you blew off his sister with a letter ?

emotion_cause.span: 6_you blew off his sister with a letter

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , that is the part where you tell him that I moved to France . When actually I will be in Cuba .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: All right , look , look , you have got to do this yourself , okay in person .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: At least you know her name .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You just go to the house and you ask for Mary ... Angela , okay , when which ever one she is comes to the door , you take her for a walk , you let her down easy .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: What if Mary ... Angela comes to the door and I ask for Mary ... Angela ?

emotion_cause.span: 11_What if Mary ... Angela comes to the door and I ask for Mary ... Angela ?
